dialogue_text: John Carter has made a proposal,
source_excerpt: "John Carter has made a proposal," he said, addressing the council, "which meets with my sanction. I shall put it to you briefly. Dejah Thoris, the Princess of Helium, who was our prisoner, is now held by the jeddak of Zodanga, whose son...

speaker.notes: First-person narration suggests John Carter as the speaker.
